---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Orvix
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Set up '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. Send request '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, logs.

## Environment
- Component: [ ] Orchestrator [ ] Node [ ] Both
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- Package version / commit SHA:
- Database: [Supabase / local Postgres]

## Logs / Screenshots
Paste relevant logs (sanitize any secrets) or screenshots.

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem here.

## Security
If this is a security vulnerability, **DO NOT submit it as a public issue**.
Instead, see [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
